==========
- Negation
==========

#eval -2
#eval -2.0
#eval -foo
#eval - -2
#eval - -foo
#eval -(2 + 2)
#eval - -(2 + 2)

---

(module
  (hash_command
    (unary_expression
      (number)))
  (hash_command
    (unary_expression
      (float)))
  (hash_command
    (unary_expression
      (identifier)))
  (hash_command
    (unary_expression
      (unary_expression
        (number))))
  (hash_command
    (unary_expression
      (unary_expression
        (identifier))))
  (hash_command
    (unary_expression
      (parenthesized
        (binary_expression
          (number)
          (number)))))
  (hash_command
    (unary_expression
      (unary_expression
        (parenthesized
          (binary_expression
            (number)
            (number)))))))

=======================
- Negation But Comments
=======================

#eval --2
#eval --foo

---

(module
  (hash_command)
  (comment)
  (hash_command)
  (comment))

==========
! Negation
==========

#eval !true
#eval !!!true
#eval !foo

---

(module
  (hash_command
    (unary_expression
      (true)))
  (hash_command
    (unary_expression
      (unary_expression
        (unary_expression
          (true)))))
  (hash_command
    (unary_expression
      (identifier))))

==========
¬ Negation
==========

#eval ¬true
#eval ¬¬¬true
#eval ¬foo

---

(module
  (hash_command
    (unary_expression
      (true)))
  (hash_command
    (unary_expression
      (unary_expression
        (unary_expression
          (true)))))
  (hash_command
    (unary_expression
      (identifier))))

==================
Binary Expressions
==================

#eval 2 + 3
#eval 2 - 3
#eval 2 * 3
#eval 2 / 3
#eval 2 % 3
#eval 2 ^ 3
#eval 2 = 3
#eval 2 ≠ 3
#eval true ∧ true
#eval true ∨ true
#eval true ↔ true
#eval true && true
#eval true || true
#eval "foo" ++ "bar"
#eval [] :: [["foo"]]
#eval 100 |> add1 |> times2
#eval foo |>.map bar |>.baz.quux 7
#eval times2 <| add1 <| 100
#eval foo <|> bar
#eval 'B' == 'B' || 'B' == 'C'
#check f ∘ g ∘ h

---

(module
  (hash_command
    (binary_expression
      (number)
      (number)))
  (hash_command
    (binary_expression
      (number)
      (number)))
  (hash_command
    (binary_expression
      (number)
      (number)))
  (hash_command
    (binary_expression
      (number)
      (number)))
  (hash_command
    (binary_expression
      (number)
      (number)))
  (hash_command
    (binary_expression
      (number)
      (number)))
  (hash_command
    (binary_expression
      (number)
      (number)))
  (hash_command
    (binary_expression
      (number)
      (number)))
  (hash_command
    (binary_expression
      (true)
      (true)))
  (hash_command
    (binary_expression
      (true)
      (true)))
  (hash_command
    (binary_expression
      (true)
      (true)))
  (hash_command
    (binary_expression
      (true)
      (true)))
  (hash_command
    (binary_expression
      (true)
      (true)))
  (hash_command
    (binary_expression
      (string)
      (string)))
  (hash_command
    (binary_expression
      (list)
      (list
        (list
          (string)))))
  (hash_command
    (binary_expression
      (binary_expression
        (number)
        (identifier))
      (identifier)))
  (hash_command
    (application
      (binary_expression
        (application
          (binary_expression
            (identifier)
            (identifier))
          (identifier))
        (projection
          (identifier)
          (identifier)))
      (number)))
  (hash_command
    (binary_expression
      (identifier)
      (binary_expression
        (identifier)
        (number))))
  (hash_command
    (binary_expression
      (identifier)
      (identifier)))
  (hash_command
    (binary_expression
      (binary_expression
        (char)
        (char))
      (binary_expression
        (char)
        (char))))
  (hash_command
    (binary_expression
      (identifier)
      (binary_expression
        (identifier)
        (identifier)))))

==========
Precedence
==========

#eval 4 == 4 - 0
#eval 4 == 3 + 1
#eval 4 == 4 * 1
#eval 4 == 4 / 1
#eval 4 == 4 % 5
example : 4 = 4 - 0 := rfl
example : 4 = 3 + 1 := rfl
example : 4 = 4 * 1 := rfl
example : 4 = 4 / 1 := rfl
example : 4 = 4 % 5 := rfl
#eval false && false || true
#eval true || false && false
#eval 2 ^ 3 * 7 + 2
#eval -2.0 ^ 3 * 7

---

(module
  (hash_command
    (binary_expression
      left: (number)
      right: (binary_expression
        left: (number)
        right: (number))))
  (hash_command
    (binary_expression
      left: (number)
      right: (binary_expression
        left: (number)
        right: (number))))
  (hash_command
    (binary_expression
      left: (number)
      right: (binary_expression
        left: (number)
        right: (number))))
  (hash_command
    (binary_expression
      left: (number)
      right: (binary_expression
        left: (number)
        right: (number))))
  (hash_command
    (binary_expression
      left: (number)
      right: (binary_expression
        left: (number)
        right: (number))))
  (example
    type: (binary_expression
      left: (number)
      right: (binary_expression
        left: (number)
        right: (number)))
    body: (identifier))
  (example
    type: (binary_expression
      left: (number)
      right: (binary_expression
        left: (number)
        right: (number)))
    body: (identifier))
  (example
    type: (binary_expression
      left: (number)
      right: (binary_expression
        left: (number)
        right: (number)))
    body: (identifier))
  (example
    type: (binary_expression
      left: (number)
      right: (binary_expression
        left: (number)
        right: (number)))
    body: (identifier))
  (example
    type: (binary_expression
      left: (number)
      right: (binary_expression
        left: (number)
        right: (number)))
    body: (identifier))
  (hash_command
    (binary_expression
      left: (binary_expression
        left: (false)
        right: (false))
      right: (true)))
  (hash_command
    (binary_expression
      left: (true)
      right: (binary_expression
        left: (false)
        right: (false))))
  (hash_command
    (binary_expression
      left: (binary_expression
        left: (number)
        right: (binary_expression
          left: (number)
          right: (number)))
      right: (number)))
  (hash_command
    (binary_expression
      left: (unary_expression
        operand: (float))
      right: (binary_expression
        left: (number)
        right: (number)))))

==========
Comparison
==========

#check 2 < 3
#check 2 ≤ 3
#check 2 <= 3
#check 2 > 3
#check 2 ≥ 3
#check 2 >= 3

---

(module
  (hash_command
    (binary_expression
      (number)
      (number)))
  (hash_command
    (binary_expression
      (number)
      (number)))
  (hash_command
    (binary_expression
      (number)
      (number)))
  (hash_command
    (binary_expression
      (number)
      (number)))
  (hash_command
    (binary_expression
      (number)
      (number)))
  (hash_command
    (binary_expression
      (number)
      (number))))

=====================
Comparison Precedence
=====================

example : id 2 < 3 = true := rfl
example : 2 > id 3 = false := rfl
example : id 2 ≤ 3 = true := rfl
example : 2 ≥ id 3 = false := rfl

---

(module
  (example
    (binary_expression
      (binary_expression
        (application
          (identifier)
          (number))
        (number))
      (true))
    (identifier))
  (example
    (binary_expression
      (binary_expression
        (number)
        (application
          (identifier)
          (number)))
      (false))
    (identifier))
  (example
    (binary_expression
      (binary_expression
        (application
          (identifier)
          (number))
        (number))
      (true))
    (identifier))
  (example
    (binary_expression
      (binary_expression
        (number)
        (application
          (identifier)
          (number)))
      (false))
    (identifier)))

==================================
Unary Arrow In Expression Do Lift
==================================

def unaryLift : IO Nat := do
  pure (← pure 1)

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    type: (application
      name: (identifier)
      arguments: (identifier))
    body: (do
      (application
        name: (identifier)
        arguments: (parenthesized
          (unary_expression
            operand: (application
              name: (identifier)
              arguments: (number))))))))
